name_cn:
BALENCIAGA* Monaco Series
New arrival from the Winter 23 Details Show♾️ Known for its large silhouette, the bag features a flexible and textured body. Made of super soft bursting calfskin, it creates rich layers with soft leather, adorned with the classic rounded BB logo®️
Size: 30 x 22 x 10 cm
Model 59452
